column3: Meet The Urban Edit: your 4-piece power kit for the girl who treats the sidewalk like a runway. It starts with the DAFNI Muse, our narrow smoothing brush that styles everything from short layers to perfect, supple waves with total precision. Add the DAFNI Icon (Amber) for all-day control and quick touch-ups that keep you looking flawless through every urban adventure. When you're ready to shift the vibe, snap on your KLIX Black Bows—the magnetic finish that amplifies your look in just one click. You might not know where your day ends, but with this edit, you’ll always arrive in style.

column3: Life moves fast, and your hair should too. This kit features DAFNI Active, the perfect on-the-go companion for a flawless touch-up on the go. Cordless and powerful, it’s your secret weapon for staying polished between meetings, flights, or gym sessions. Elevate your vibe instantly with KLIX Rose Gold Bows for a soft, metallic glow, or keep it effortlessly chic with our Minimalist Black clips. No matter where you’re headed, you’re always just one click away from perfection.

column3: The ultimate hair wardrobe has arrived. DAFNI Unlimited is our 6-piece master collection designed for every hair type and every possible vibe. Keep your look sleek and perfectly pulled together with the Icon (available in both Black and Amber!), and when you’re ready to celebrate the day, snap on your KLIX Bows in Rose Gold or Black. column3:
RENEWED UNIT
1-year warranty
Professionally inspected, tested and cleaned


The original DAFNI hair straightening brush that broke the internet is back in a Special Edition! It comes with an exclusive stand and a plastic thermal cover that protects you from the hot bristles after using the brush.
  • Dafni Hair Straightening Brush – DAFNI's renowned patented technology brings you the original electric heated brush, to style your hair in minutes.
  • 8X the surface of a flat iron in a smart 3D structure.
  • Safe for your hair - DAFNI uses lower temperatures than most tools, doesn’t sketch the hair like flat irons, and gives a much gentler treatment for healthy long hair for years to come.
  • The easiest tool for smoothing and styling! It's like brushing your hair.
  • It can style up to 10x more hair in each easy brushing stroke.
  • Use only on dry hair.

TECHNOLOGY

65% of women questioned said they would like to style their hair but don’t because it is too time-consuming (source- Mintel report). DAFNI’s patented technology was developed to help you achieve your hair goals while understanding and respecting your endless roles, ambitions, and impossible agenda.

MATERIALS

Uncompromised from the foundations. Quality is one of our core values and we never compromise on your hair health and safety. We gather the best materials around the world to help you upgrade your hair relationships. has been the industry's standard.

DESIGN

Our dream team is in every detail. Designed and patented with love, with over 50% of the team women powerhouses, we design products we need and fall head over heels before beginning to manufacture any.

BENEFITS:

Developed with all hair types in mind. Great time saver- can smooth and style hair up to ten times faster in simple brushing strokes. Gives a much gentler treatment, in order to keep healthy and damage-free hair. Small and efficient, can be carried in a bag or purse. Includes thermal cover and brush stand for your safety and convenience.

column2: DAFNI Power - The Original Hair Straightening Brush
column3:
NEXT-LEVEL HAIR STRAIGHTENING BRUSH. AS EASY AS BRUSHING HAIR.

DAFNI Power Hair Straightening Brush is the perfect styling tool to straighten, smooth, and add incredible glossy shine.

Thanks to a 3D matrix providing 7x the surface area of a conventional flat iron, you can style more hair, quickly, with far less damage. Consequently, there's no need for clamping or pulling; instead, enjoy easy and intuitive styling while simply brushing.

Love your vibrant and healthy hair every day with DAFNI Power Hair Straightening Brush!

  • EASY TO USE: Style multiple layers of hair in a single brush stroke, making it less time-consuming. In fact, if you can brush your hair, you can Dafni!
  • LONG-LASTING RESULTS: DAFNI Power incorporates the most advanced hair care technologies that keep your hair looking better for longer.
  • SAFER FOR YOUR HAIR: It keeps a constant 365°F, the optimal hair styling temperature for effective styling while protecting your hair from unnecessary damage.
  • ANTI-FRIZZ: Unique anti-static bristles eliminate frizz, ensuring you can achieve silky and smooth results.
  • SAFER USAGE: With 3 layers of external bristles covering the heated ceramic surface, you're better protected from burns and can enjoy easy and safe usage.
  • REDESIGNED BRUSH: DAFNI Power hair straightening brush gives extra control and promises a smoother and shinier finish that lasts longer.

Unlock the secret to effortless styling, advanced technology, and healthier hair with DAFNI Power, the next-level hair straightening brush, your key to a dazzling, salon-worthy look every day!

column2: DAFNI Muse - Hair Styling and Straightening Brush
column3:
DAFNI Muse - Hair Styling and Straightening Brush is the ultimate hair styling tool that combines innovation with elegance for salon-worthy results at home.

With its advanced features and sleek design, DAFNI Muse is your go-to solution for effortlessly beautiful hair and long-lasting results. Recommended for short to medium-length hair.

Key Features:

  •  Ceramic Surface Design: The ceramic surface ensures even heat distribution for consistent results without hot spots or damage.
  •  ANTI-FRIZZ: Unique anti-static bristles eliminate frizz, so you can achieve silky and smooth results.
  • Optimized Temperature: Keeps a constant 365°F, the optimal hair styling temperature for effective styling while protecting your hair from unnecessary damage. 
  • Quick Heating: DAFNI Muse heats up in just 60 seconds, allowing you to start styling without delay.
  • Automatic Shut-Off: For safety and peace of mind, the brush automatically shuts off after 60 minutes of inactivity.
  • 360° Swivel Cord: The 360° swivel cord offers flexibility and ease of movement during styling, reducing tangling and discomfort.
  • Ergonomic Design: The brush is designed with comfort and ease of use in mind, featuring an ergonomic handle for a secure grip.
  • Dual Voltage: Perfect for international travel, DAFNI Muse is dual voltage compatible (110-240V).

Experience the power of DAFNI Muse and elevate your hair styling game with salon-quality results.

How do I use my DAFNI muse? 

Begin with dry hair.
° Work in approximately 1-2 sections
° Place the bristles starting at the root through your hair
For Smoothing
Brush slowly, making sure the hair gets deep inside the hot bristles. Repeat with the next section.
For bouncy waves
  • Place hair at the cool tip of the brush at an angle to avoid hair wrapping 
  • Keeping the brush in position near the roots, rotate out so the hair wraps around the brush/ through the bristles
  • Continue rotating the brush until the hair starts to wrap around the handle 
  • Once all hair is rotated around the bristles, release the curl
